case_title: SUSANA LEMUS VS. CARSON HENRY SCHEIDT

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEMUS, SUSANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SCHEIDT, CARSON HENRY SCHEIDT, KURT $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,075.00, COMBINED MEDICAL BILLS AND PAIN & SUFFERING. DEFENDANT ADMITTED REAR ENDING VEHICLE 5-10 MPH. DRS. CONCURR WARRANTED TREATMENT. NOTE: PLAINTIFF SOUGHT "ATM" DEAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LEMUS, SUSANA AS TO DEFENDANT SCHEIDT, CARSON HENRY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-22-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-22-2022 BY RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF SUSANA LEMUS IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE, WITH MANUEL ARVEA, HUSBAND OF PLAINTIFF SPEAKING ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT CARSON HENRY SCHEIDT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT KURT SCHEIDT IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. COURT GRANTS ZOOM APPEARANCES FOR PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF REQUEST FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER, JUDGE FOUND PLAINTIFF CAN SPEAK AND UNDERSTAND ENGLISH WELL ENOUGH TO MOVE FORWARD WITHOUT INTERPRETER. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANTS WAIVE SERVICE TO MOVE FORWARD FOR HEARING. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REMARK: PLANTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECD VIA MAIL - SUBMITTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2022 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SCHEIDT, CARSON HENRY SCHEIDT, KURT
